brightness_pct: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_brightness <N>   # N = round(percent * 255 / 100). e.g. 50% -> 128. brightness is 0-255 in the `system` namespace
auto_brightness: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_brightness_mode <0|1>   # 0 = manual, 1 = automatic; `system` namespace
screen_timeout: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_off_timeout <MS>   # MS in MILLISECONDS = seconds * 1000 (1 min = 60000); `system` namespace
airplane: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global airplane_mode_on <0|1>   # boolean 0/1 in the `global` namespace
autorotate: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system accelerometer_rotation <0|1>   # 1 = auto-rotate on, 0 = off; `system` namespace
location_mode: python3 SET-2/settings.py put secure location_mode <CODE>   # enum in `secure`: off=0, sensors_only=1, battery_saving=2, high_accuracy=3
haptics: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system haptic_feedback_enabled <0|1>   # boolean 0/1 in the `system` namespace
bluetooth: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global bluetooth_on <0|1>   # boolean 0/1 in the `global` namespace
data_roaming: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global data_roaming <0|1>   # boolean 0/1 in the `global` namespace
adb: python3 SET-2/settings.py put secure adb_enabled <0|1>   # boolean 0/1 in the `secure` namespace (usb debugging)
